title: 10 Things Humility Actually Looks Like in a Man
caption:
Most men think humility is quiet and passive.

It's not. It's one of the most active, costly things a man can practice.

It looks like asking a question when you already have an opinion. Staying in the room when you're being corrected. Giving credit away. Changing your mind in public. Getting on your knees when it feels like nothing.

"What does the Lord require of you but to do justice, and to love kindness, and to walk humbly with your God." — Micah 6:8

Save this. Pick one and practice it this week.

#faith #christianmen #humility #godlymen #manofgod #characterbuilding #christianity #scripture #discipleship
